titleStmt.title: SII 22.447: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 447. (A.R. No. 447 of 1906) MADURAI DISTRICT, MADURAI TALUK, KĪḺAḌI near ŚILAIMĀṈ On the south wall of central shrine in the Arjunēśvara temple Māṟavarman Tribhº Kulaśēkharadēva, Year 23

summary.p: Records that Kūpakarāya, the son of Maḻabarāya rebuilt the temple and gave different names to the god and his consort in order to secure merit of his parents. The temple is called Muchukundatiruvirāmēśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār at Śrīkuntadēvich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya to the east of the tank (kuḷakkīḻ) at Vēlūr in Madurōdaya-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī komāṟavarmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulaśekharadevaṟ(k)ku yāṇṭu 2 10 3 vatu midhunaṉāyaṟṟu 6 tiyati purvvapakṣattu tṛtiyaiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ Uṭaiyār muṭivaḻaṅku pāṇṭiyayiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāna maturotayavaḷaṉāṭṭu velūr kuḷakkiḻ bṛhmadeyam śrīkuntadeviccaturvvedimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Ivvūr mucukuṉtatiruvirāmīśvaramuṭaiya
nāyaṉār(ā) koyililt tiruvācalilk kūṭṭakkuṟaivaṟak kūṭiiruntu In nāyaṉār koyilil Irupattiraṇṭāvatu Ukantaruḷuvitta kūttāṭuvāraiyum nācciyāraiyum Uṭaiyār maḻavarāyar makaṉār kūpakarāyar Inta dharmmaṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ikkūttāṭuvārum nācciyārum Ulokamaḻutu ceytu tiruppaka ceyyāteyirukkaiyāl taṅkaḷ mātākkaḷ tavappaṉār perāl kūttāṭuvāṟku
sūriśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār Eṉṟu śivanāmattālum taṅkaḷ mātākkaḷ tāyār perāl ttam pirāṭṭiyār Eṉṟu śivanāmattālum Idharmmaṅkaikkoṇṭu tiruppaṇikkuṟaivaṟṟac ceyvittu tirupratiṣṭaiyum tirukalyāṇamuñ ceyvittu Eṟi Aruḷap paṇṇi Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭikaḷum palapaṭi nimantaṅkaḷuṅ kuṟaivaṟuttu tirunāḷumeḻuntaruḷuvittu Icoṟppaṭiyile kallilum cempilum veṭ
ṭi koḻka Ippaṭi sammatittu mahāsabhākośam kuṭuttom mahāsabhaiyom Ippaṭikku ṅkalattātreyaṉ kaṭalaṭaicca perumāḷ śrī haṉumabhaṭṭanāna śrīkulaśekhara nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kāceripāpākuṭi kāśyapaṉ śrī rakunāthaṉ vāmaṉabhaṭṭar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Aṅkārimaṅkalattu raukṣāyaṇaṉ keśabhaṭṭaṉāṉa tirumakiḻa mālai māṟpu dāsaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai kācerippāppākuṭi koṟṟavaṉ Ejñaḻutti Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tirukaṭavūr tiru Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikkuppāppākuṭi . kāḷameghapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai pāpā kuṭicirāmaṉ Ejñaḻutti paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai cerippāppākuṭi kāśyapaṉ kāḷamegham tirumāliruñcolai nārāyaṇabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai 3 ceriaṅkārimaṅkalattātṛeyaṉ jaṭādharaṉ śrīnarasiṅhabhaṭṭaṉāṉa tirukkalikaṉṟa dāsaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai pāppākuṭi puruṣōttamaṉk koṟṟamalli paṭṭaṉṉāna tirumalai nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Aṅkāramaṅkalattu kāḷamekam śrī cuntarattoḷuṭaiyāṉāṉa tiruppullāṇi nampi Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.447 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
